notes: Shell rows must be WM-only client identities.
Do not copy stock summon spell rows for WM abilities.
If server-side DBC rows are required, stage matching files into D:\WOW\WM_BridgeLab\run\data\dbc\ before testing.

shells.label: Bonebound Servant
shells.tooltip: Raise a Bonebound Servant from a nearby corpse.
implementation_notes: Use a WM-only shell row, not a copied stock summon spell.
Configure the shell as a dummy/script summon shell so the server owns the full pet behavior.
Bind the server-side behavior through mod-wm-spells using createdBySpellId 940000.

shells.label: Bonebound Slash
shells.tooltip: Order your Bonebound Servant to use its WM-owned pet action.
implementation_notes: Reserved for later. Do not ship until the base servant lifecycle is stable.
